message:
test(fcp-core): pin HRW select+rank coordinator selector ordering invariants (flywheel_connectors-u0771)

Bead asks for ConnectorSelector ordering. No type literally named
ConnectorSelector exists in fcp-core; the closest analogue is the public
HRW selector pair select_checkpoint_coordinator + rank_checkpoint_coordinators
at checkpoint.rs:671+687. Existing checkpoint_golden_vectors.rs covers
deterministic selection, descending-hash ranking, and epoch sensitivity;
this pin adds orthogonal invariants.

Coverage: empty + single-node boundaries (None / [node]),
select-equals-rank-first agreement, input-permutation invariance
(reverse + rotate produce same ranking), descending-hash ordering for
arbitrary 8-node input, zone sensitivity sentinel (work/private/public
must not all collapse to same coordinator), HRW removal property
(removing runner-up preserves remaining order), HRW insertion property
(adding new node preserves relative order of existing nodes), no silent
deduplication of duplicate inputs, hash determinism + node-id +
epoch sensitivity + distinct-node-no-collision smoke.

15 tests green via CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/fcp-p1-u0771 cargo test -p
fcp-core --test connector_selector_ordering.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
